info.name: 00-FixtureStripeRide
info.description: The FIXTURE: builds the one real Stripe card ride that 01-07 attach to (driver onboarding + Stripe Connect + rider card + search/accept/start/end + ride invoices + COMPLETED). Ends with fail-fast fixture GUARDS so a broken fixture dies here, not downstream: V4/#17 payment_order.id is a real GUID != rideId; V2 BPP ride commission > 0 (else Case-2/agg asserts are vacuous); V5 the RIDE_FARE component cap > 0. No refund actions.

exec: // Auto-skip mock-server requests when envType is not Local.
// Set envType=Local in Local env files; omit / set to 'Master' otherwise.
console.log('[skip] mock-only request on envType=' + envType + ': ' + (pm.info && pm.info.requestName));
// Finnish mobile: 04X XXXXXXX (10 digits starting with 04)
// Finnish plate: ABC123 (no hyphen — API requires ^[0-9A-Z]*$)

item.name: Clear rider pending dues (stale DUE ledger entries -> SETTLED)

exec: pm.test('rider dues cleared (no DUE ledger entries block a new ride)', function(){ pm.expect(pm.response.code, pm.response.text()).to.be.oneOf([200,201]); });
pm.test('Blocked without bank account', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
pm.test('Blocked - charges not enabled (400)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
// Use default test card from Stripe mock

// Wait for async beckn search processing across services
const _delay = 5000; const _start = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - _start < _delay) {}

pm.test('Has estimates', function () { pm.expect(d, 'response body').to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(d.estimates, 'estimates field').to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(d.estimates.length, 'estimate count').to.be.above(0); });

// Wait for async select processing before next step
const _sel_delay = 8000; const _sel_start = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - _sel_start < _sel_delay) {}
// Wait briefly before checking nearby requests
// Dashboard-compatible poll (the CLI retry hook is unavailable here). Driver-pool fires batches
// every ~22s; the freshly-created test driver may miss the first batch. Poll up to ~50s.
pm.test('Has search requests', function(){ pm.expect(0, 'driver pool empty after ~50s polling - driver not matched (check LTS driver_id / producer dispatch)').to.be.above(0); });
else { console.log('Pool empty on first check - polling driver pool (~22s batches)...'); _poll(10); }
// Wait for invoice generation after ride end
console.log('Invoice ' + i + ': number=' + inv.invoiceNumber + ' type=' + inv.invoiceType + ' amount=' + inv.totalAmountPayable);
pm.test('Response has invoices array', function () { pm.expect(d.invoices).to.be.an('array'); });
while (Date.now() - start < 3000) { /* wait for invoice generation */ }
pm.test('Response has invoices array', function () { pm.expect(d.invoices).to.be.an('array'); });
console.log('Invoice ' + i + ': number=' + inv.invoiceNumber + ' type=' + inv.invoiceType + ' status=' + inv.invoiceStatus + ' total=' + inv.totalAmount);
pm.test('Selected offers has offers array', function () { pm.expect(ride.selectedOffers).to.have.property('offers'); });
// Give the ledger time to post wallet entries after ride end
const start = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - start < 1500) { /* wait */ }

item.name: Fixture guard: capture BAP rideId (SQL — poll until drained)

exec: function _finish(rows){ if(!rows.length){ pm.test('fixture ride row present', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no ride for the completed booking').to.be.above(0); }); return; } var r=rows[0]; pm.environment.set('rideId', r.id); pm.environment.set('bppRideId', r.bpp_ride_id); pm.environment.set('driver_ride_id', r.bpp_ride_id); pm.test('fixture ride row present (rideId + bppRideId)', function(){ pm.expect(r.id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(r.bpp_ride_id,'ride must carry a bpp_ride_id').to.not.be.empty; }); console.log('Fixture: rideId='+r.id+' bppRideId='+r.bpp_ride_id); }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Fixture guard V4/#17: payment_order.id is a real GUID != rideId

exec: function _finish(rows){ if(!rows.length){ pm.test('payment_order present for the ride', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no payment_order for ride (charge not settled?)').to.be.above(0); }); return; } var o=rows[0]; pm.environment.set('orderId', o.id); pm.environment.set('orderShortId', o.short_id); var rid=pm.environment.get('rideId'); console.log('Fixture V4: order.id='+o.id+' domain_entity_id='+o.domain_entity_id+' rideId='+rid); pm.test('V4/#17 payment_order.id is a real GUID and is NOT the rideId', function(){ pm.expect(/^[0-9a-fA-F-]{16,}$/.test(String(o.id)),'order.id should be a GUID').to.be.true; pm.expect(o.id,'order.id must differ from rideId (else the order==ride bug is masked)').to.not.eql(rid); pm.expect(o.domain_entity_id,'domain_entity_id must equal rideId').to.eql(rid); }); pm.test('order carries a Stripe payment intent (pi_)', function(){ pm.expect(/^pi_/.test(String(o.payment_service_order_id))).to.be.true; }); }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Fixture guard: wait for CHARGED transaction (charge settled — prevents the 00->01 race)

exec: function _finish(rows){ if(!rows.length){ pm.test('CHARGED payment_transaction settled before the fixture completes', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no CHARGED txn after ~60s — the async charge settlement did not complete; downstream collections need this').to.be.above(0); }); return; } var t=rows[0]; pm.environment.set('txn_amount', String(t.amount)); pm.environment.set('currency', t.currency); pm.test('CHARGED payment_transaction settled (fixture ready for refunds)', function(){ pm.expect(Number(t.amount)).to.be.above(0); }); console.log('Fixture: CHARGED T='+t.amount+' '+t.currency+' (settled)'); }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Fixture guard V2: BPP ride commission > 0 (else Case-2/agg tests are vacuous)

exec: function _finish(rows){ if(!rows.length){ pm.test('BPP ride row present', function(){ pm.expect(0,'no BPP ride row (KV not drained?)').to.be.above(0); }); return; } var r=rows[0]; var comm=Number(r.commission==null?0:r.commission); pm.environment.set('bpp_commission', String(comm)); console.log('Fixture V2: bpp commission='+comm); pm.test('V2 BPP ride commission > 0 (fixture must support Case-2 clawback + agg-commission)', function(){ pm.expect(comm,'commission must be > 0 or all Case-2/agg asserts pass vacuously; check the local commission config').to.be.above(0); }); }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }

item.name: Fixture guard V5: RIDE_FARE component cap > 0

exec: function _finish(rows){ var bk=[]; if(rows&&rows.length){ try{ bk=JSON.parse(rows[0].fare_breakups||'[]'); }catch(e){ bk=[]; } } var cap=Math.round(bk.filter(function(b){return _RF.indexOf(b.description)>=0;}).reduce(function(a,b){return a+Number(b.amount||0);},0)*100)/100; if(cap>0){ pm.environment.set('rideFareCap', String(cap)); } console.log('Fixture V5: rideFareCap='+cap); pm.test('V5 RIDE_FARE component cap > 0 (do NOT fall back to T; a zero cap masks a capture regression)', function(){ pm.expect(cap,'RIDE_FARE cap from fare_breakup_info must be > 0').to.be.above(0); }); }

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{ mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody() } }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(rows.length){ _finish(rows); } else if(n>0){ setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } else { _finish([]); } }); }
